rulings.Case Title: JENNA LIDDELL VS. EDWARDS LIFESCIENCES, A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 24, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANT EDWARDS LIFESCIENCES CORPORATION'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THE MOTION IS DENIED. ASSUMING DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF TO PLAINTIFF, PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED SEVERAL MATERIAL DISPUTES OF FACT, INCLUDING 22, 41, 56, 61, 66, 68, 71, 74 AND 79. PLAINTIFF HAS A SINGLE CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON VARIOUS ALLEGED ACTS. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS NOT AN AVAILABLE REMEDY GIVEN THE SINGLE CAUSE OF ACTION AND MULTIPLE DISPUTED FACTS. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES CAMERON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS RELFECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Appoint Wilma Cameron As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 24, 2007, LINE 3. PLAINTIFF CHARLES CAMERON'S MOTION To Appoint Wilma Cameron As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC VS. EDGARDO A MONCADA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 24, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT EDGARDO MONCADA'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment IS GRANTED. ALTHOUGH DEFENDANT WAITED LONGER THAN HE SHOULD HAVE TO ADDRESS THIS CASE, THE REQUEST FOR RELIEF IS WITHIN CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 473. IT APPEARS FROM THE RECORD THAT DEFENDANT WAS NOT SERVED. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD CURTIS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 24, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANT SHELL OIL COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN J MASSOCCA VS. WILLIAM HIGGINS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 24, 2007, LINE 6. DEFENDANTS WILLIAM HIGGINS AND WILLIAM UPSON'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. ALTHOUGH AN IDENTIFIED SUM OF MONEY MAY BE A BASIS FOR CONVERSION, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO ALLEGE SUCH FACTS WITH THE REQUISITE SPECIFICITY. THERE ALSO IS A QUESTION WHETHER PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO NAME THE PARTY OR PARTIES WHO PRESENTLY CONTROL THE SEPCIFIC PROPERTY. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY PLOCHER et al VS. SHOSHANA GREEN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 24, 2007, LINE 10. DEFENDANTS SHOSHANA GREEN, LESLIE SCHICKEL, LAUREN KOHNE AND GABRIEL CROCKER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, FIVE DAYS TO ANSWER.
